ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cables" (
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cable */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cable type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cable (e.g., BD-FPE AL2-4x5 0.60 kV) */,
  "rated_voltage" REAL /* Rated voltage of the cable in kV */,
  "rated_current" REAL /* Rated current of the cable in kA */,
  "nominal_frequency" INTEGER /* Nominal frequency of the cable */,
  "temperature_rating" REAL /* Temperature rating of the cable in °C */,
  "insulation_material" TEXT /* Insulation material of the cable */,
  "shielding" TEXT /* Shielding type of the cable */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the cable in meters */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the cable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cables_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES cable_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cable_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cable type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cable type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cable type */,
  "conductor_material" TEXT /* Conductor material of the cable type */,
  "conductor_size" TEXT /* Conductor size of the cable type */,
  "armor_type" TEXT /* Armor type of the cable type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electrical property */,
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cable the property belongs to */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the electrical property */,
  "r_ac" REAL /* AC resistance of the cable in Ohm/km */,
  "x" REAL /* Reactance of the cable in Ohm/km */,
  "l" REAL /* Inductance of the cable in Ohm/km */,
  "r0_ac" REAL /* AC resistance of the cable at 20°C in Ohm/km */,
  "x0" REAL /* Reactance of the cable at 20°C in Ohm/km */,
  "l0" REAL /* Inductance of the cable at 20°C in mH/km */,
  "capacitance" REAL /* Capacitance of the cable in nF/km */,
  "dielectric_losses" REAL /* Dielectric losses of the cable in W/km */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrical_properties_cable_id FOREIGN KEY ("cable_id") REFERENCES cables ("cable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cable_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cable the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., datasheet, manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cable_documents_cable_id FOREIGN KEY ("cable_id") REFERENCES cables ("cable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cable being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cable */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cable was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cable_id FOREIGN KEY ("cable_id") REFERENCES cables ("cable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cable_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "cable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cable being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the cable was revised */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cable_revisions_cable_id FOREIGN KEY ("cable_id") REFERENCES cables ("cable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date when the team was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)
